name: BELKA NORM
css: .lt-container { position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; width: 1920px; height: 1080px; pointer-events: none; opacity: 0; transition: opacity 0.5s; } .lt-container.active { opacity: 1; } .lower-third-canvas { display: block; width: 100%; height: 100%; }
